所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

A

ACCENT_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Accent color (Warm amber) - used for highlights
AdminManageWorkloadFrame - system.admin中的类
Frame for administrators to manage TA workload.
AdminManageWorkloadFrame(List<User>) - 类的构造器 system.admin.AdminManageWorkloadFrame
Constructs the frame to manage TA workload.
AdminViewAllJobsFrame - system.admin中的类
Frame for administrators to view all job positions with status filtering.
AdminViewAllJobsFrame() - 类的构造器 system.admin.AdminViewAllJobsFrame
Constructs the frame to view all job positions.
AdminViewAllTAsFrame - system.admin中的类
Frame for administrators to view all Teaching Assistants with filtering capabilities.
AdminViewAllTAsFrame(List<User>) - 类的构造器 system.admin.AdminViewAllTAsFrame
Constructs the frame to view all TAs.
AdminViewLogsFrame - system.admin中的类
Frame for administrators to view system logs.
AdminViewLogsFrame() - 类的构造器 system.admin.AdminViewLogsFrame
Constructs the frame to view system logs.
AdminViewWorkloadFrame - system.admin中的类
Frame for Admin to view TA workload summary.
AdminViewWorkloadFrame(List<User>) - 类的构造器 system.admin.AdminViewWorkloadFrame
 
Application - system中的类
Represents a TA's application to a job position.
Application(String, String, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 system.Application
Constructs a new Application.

B

BACKGROUND_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Background color (Gray 50) - main application background

C

calculateSkillMatch(List<String>, List<String>) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Calculates the skill match percentage between a TA and a job.
CARD_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Card background color
createAccentButton(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates an accent-styled button.
createButton(String, Color) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a rounded button with hover and press effects.
createCardPanel() - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a card panel with a subtle shadow effect.
createMatchLabel(int) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
 
createPasswordField() - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a password field with rounded corners and focus effect.
createPrimaryButton(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a primary-styled button.
createScrollPane(Component) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a JScrollPane with modern, styled scroll bars.
createSkillTag(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a styled skill tag label.
createSkillTag(String, boolean) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
 
createTextField() - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a text field with rounded corners and focus effect.
createTitle(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Creates a title label with the primary color and bold font.

D

DANGER_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Danger color (Muted soft red) - for errors and destructive actions
DashboardFrame - system中的类
The main dashboard frame for the TA Recruitment System.
DashboardFrame(User, List<User>) - 类的构造器 system.DashboardFrame
Constructs the dashboard frame for the specified user.
DISABLED_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Disabled color (Soft cool gray) - for disabled elements

F

FileUtil - system中的类
Utility class for file-based data persistence operations.
FileUtil() - 类的构造器 system.FileUtil
 
fromString(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.Application
Parses a CSV string to create an Application object.
fromString(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.Job
Parses a CSV string to create a Job object.
fromString(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.Notification
Parses a CSV string to create a Notification object.
fromString(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.Profile
Parses a CSV string to create a Profile object.

G

getApplicantLimit() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the applicant limit.
getApplicationId() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the application ID.
getApplyTime() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the application timestamp.
getContent() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the notification content.
getCreateTime() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the creation timestamp.
getCvPath() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the CV file path.
getDeadline() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the application deadline.
getDescription() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the job description.
getDescription() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the self-description.
getEmail() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the TA's email.
getEmail() - 类中的方法 system.User
Returns the user's email address.
getGrade() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the academic grade.
getJob() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the Job object associated with this application.
getJobId() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the target job ID.
getJobId() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the unique job identifier.
getMajor() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the major.
getModuleCode() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the module code.
getModuleName() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the full module name.
getMoEmail() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the Module Organizer's email.
getName() - 类中的方法 system.User
Returns the user's display name.
getNotificationId() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the notification ID.
getNotificationsByRecipient(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Retrieves all notifications for a specific recipient.
getPassword() - 类中的方法 system.User
Returns the user's password.
getPhone() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the phone number.
getProfileByEmail(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Finds a profile by email address.
getRecipientEmail() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the recipient's email.
getRequirements() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the requirements.
getRole() - 类中的方法 system.User
Returns the user's role.
getSkills() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the list of required skills.
getSkills() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the list of skills.
getStatus() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the current status.
getStatus() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the current status.
getStudentId() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns the student ID.
getTaEmail() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns the applicant's email.
getTitle() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the notification title.
getType() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns the notification type.
getUnreadNotificationCount(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Counts the number of unread notifications for a user.
getWeeklyHours() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns the weekly hours required.

I

isRead() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns whether the notification has been read.

J

Job - system中的类
Represents a TA job position in the TA Management System.
Job(String, String, String, String, String, int, String, String, String, int) - 类的构造器 system.Job
Constructs a new Job without skills.
Job(String, String, String, String, String, int, String, String, String, int, List<String>) - 类的构造器 system.Job
Constructs a new Job with skills.

L

loadApplications() - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Loads the list of applications from the applications data file.
loadJobs() - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Loads the list of jobs from the jobs data file.
loadNotifications() - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Loads the list of notifications from the notifications data file.
loadProfiles() - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Loads the list of profiles from the profiles data file.
loadUsers() - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Loads the list of users from the users data file.
logCreate(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs an entity creation operation.
logDelete(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs an entity deletion operation.
logError(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs an error condition.
LoggerUtil - system中的类
Utility class for system-wide logging operations.
LoggerUtil() - 类的构造器 system.LoggerUtil
 
logInfo(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs general information.
LoginFrame - system中的类
The login frame for the TA Recruitment System.
LoginFrame() - 类的构造器 system.LoginFrame
Constructs the login frame and initializes the UI.
logLogin(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs a user login action.
logLogout(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs a user logout action.
logRegistration(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs a user registration action.
logUpdate(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoggerUtil
Logs an entity update operation.

M

main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 system.LoginFrame
Application entry point.
markAllNotificationsAsRead(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Marks all notifications for a user as read.
markNotificationAsRead(String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Marks a specific notification as read.
minimumLayoutSize(Container) - 类中的方法 system.ui.WrapLayout
Returns the minimum dimensions for this layout.
MOEditJobFrame - system.mo中的类
Frame for Module Organizers to edit an existing job position.
MOEditJobFrame(User, Job) - 类的构造器 system.mo.MOEditJobFrame
 
MOMyJobsFrame - system.mo中的类
Frame for Module Organizers to view and manage their posted job positions.
MOMyJobsFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.mo.MOMyJobsFrame
Constructs the frame to view and manage posted jobs.
MOPostJobFrame - system.mo中的类
Frame for Module Organizers to post new TA job positions.
MOPostJobFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.mo.MOPostJobFrame
 
MOViewApplicantsFrame - system.mo中的类
Frame for Module Organizers to view and manage applicants for their job positions.
MOViewApplicantsFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.mo.MOViewApplicantsFrame
 

N

Notification - system中的类
Represents a notification message in the TA Management System.
Notification(String, String, String, String, String, String, boolean) - 类的构造器 system.Notification
Constructs a new Notification.
NotificationFrame - system中的类
The notification center frame for viewing and managing notifications.
NotificationFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.NotificationFrame
Constructs the notification frame for the specified user.
NotificationFrame(User, Runnable) - 类的构造器 system.NotificationFrame
Constructs the notification frame with a callback for read status changes.

P

preferredLayoutSize(Container) - 类中的方法 system.ui.WrapLayout
Returns the preferred dimensions for this layout.
PRIMARY_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Primary color (Indigo 600) - used for main actions
Profile - system中的类
Represents a Teaching Assistant's profile information.
Profile(String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 system.Profile
Constructs a new Profile without skills.
Profile(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, List<String>) - 类的构造器 system.Profile
Constructs a new Profile with skills.

R

RegisterFrame - system中的类
The registration frame for new users.
RegisterFrame(List<User>) - 类的构造器 system.RegisterFrame
Constructs the registration frame.

S

saveApplications(List<Application>) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Saves a list of applications to the applications data file.
saveJobs(List<Job>) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Saves a list of jobs to the jobs data file.
saveNotifications(List<Notification>) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Saves a list of notifications to the notifications data file.
saveProfiles(List<Profile>) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Saves a list of profiles to the profiles data file.
saveUsers(List<User>) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Saves a list of users to the users data file.
SECONDARY_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Secondary color (Indigo 500) - used for secondary elements
sendNotification(String, String, String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.FileUtil
Sends a new notification to a recipient.

Sets the applicant limit.
setCvPath(String) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the CV file path.
setDescription(String) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the self-description.
setGrade(String) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the academic grade.
setMajor(String) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the major.
setName(String) - 类中的方法 system.User
Sets the user's display name.
setPassword(String) - 类中的方法 system.User
Sets the user's password.
setPhone(String) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the phone number.
setRead(boolean) - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Sets the read status.
setSkills(List<String>) - 类中的方法 system.Job
Sets the required skills.
setSkills(List<String>) - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Sets the skills list.
setStatus(String) - 类中的方法 system.Application
Sets the application status.
setStatus(String) - 类中的方法 system.Job
Sets the job status.
showConfirmDialog(Component, String, String, int) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Show a styled confirmation dialog.
showErrorDialog(Component, String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Show a styled error dialog.
showInfoDialog(Component, String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Show a styled information dialog.
showMessageDialog(Component, String, String, int) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Show a styled message dialog.
showWarningDialog(Component, String, String) - 类中的静态方法 system.UIHelper
Show a styled warning dialog.
SUCCESS_COLOR - 类中的静态变量 system.UIHelper
Success color (Muted teal-green) - for positive states
system - 程序包 system

system.mo - 程序包 system.mo
 
system.ta - 程序包 system.ta

T

TAApplicationStatusFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to view the status of their job applications.
TAApplicationStatusFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAApplicationStatusFrame
 
TACVUploadFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to upload their CV.
TACVUploadFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TACVUploadFrame
 
TAJobListFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to browse available job positions.
TAJobListFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAJobListFrame
 
TAProfileCreateFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to create their profile for the first time.
TAProfileCreateFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAProfileCreateFrame
 
TAProfileEditFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to edit their profile information.
TAProfileEditFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAProfileEditFrame
 
TAProfileViewFrame - system.ta中的类
Frame for Teaching Assistants to view their profile information.
TAProfileViewFrame(User) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAProfileViewFrame
 
TAProfileViewFrame(User, String) - 类的构造器 system.ta.TAProfileViewFrame
 
toString() - 类中的方法 system.Application
Returns a string representation of this application in CSV format.
toString() - 类中的方法 system.Job
Returns a string representation of this job in CSV format.
toString() - 类中的方法 system.Notification
Returns a string representation of this notification in CSV format.
toString() - 类中的方法 system.Profile
Returns a string representation of this profile in CSV format.
toString() - 类中的方法 system.User
Returns a string representation of this user in CSV format.

U

UIHelper - system中的类
Utility class providing consistent modern UI styling for Swing components.
UIHelper() - 类的构造器 system.UIHelper
 
User - system中的类
Represents a user in the TA Management System.
User(String, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 system.User
Constructs a new User with the specified credentials and information.

W

WrapLayout - system.ui中的类
A flow layout that wraps components to the next line when they exceed the container width.
WrapLayout() - 类的构造器 system.ui.WrapLayout
Constructs a new WrapLayout with left alignment.
WrapLayout(int) - 类的构造器 system.ui.WrapLayout
Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment.
WrapLayout(int, int, int) - 类的构造器 system.ui.WrapLayout
Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment and gaps.
